description: Contract-compatible mock RailAdapter — scripted success/decline/timeout/rate-limit scenarios, realistic latency profiles, webhook callbacks that mirror real rails (pacs.002, PaymentStatusReport); d...

fields.name: scenario
fields.label: Scenario for this specific call (can override profile)

contract: MUST: implement every method of the RailAdapter contract identically to real rails — authorize, capture, refund, status, supports_currency
MUST: response schemas match real rails exactly, including error codes and webhook payloads (pacs.002, PaymentStatusReport)
determinism: MUST: same correlation_id + scenario = same response every time
safety: MUST: never forward calls to real rails, even by accident

anti_patterns.rule: Do not register this adapter in a production rail registry
anti_patterns.why: Required by sandbox-rail-adapter contract — violating this rule breaks security, privacy, or correctness guarantees documented in rules{}

anti_patterns.rule: Do not diverge from real-rail response shape — defeats the purpose of the sandbox
anti_patterns.why: Required by sandbox-rail-adapter contract — violating this rule breaks security, privacy, or correctness guarantees documented in rules{}

approved.result: Returns success with sandbox: true tag

timed_out.result: No response within rail SLA — PGW should emit PGW_RAIL_ERROR

related.reason: Registered as a first-class adapter in the sandbox registry
The sandbox environment exclusively routes through this adapter
